compiled_state.title: [debug-everything]: in_progress bug tickets filtered out -> bugs stuck in_progress never retried
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Incident Overview

The /dso:debug-everything skill only looks at open bugs when deciding which tickets to fix. Bug tickets that are currently in_progress status are ignored entirely and never retried. This means any bug that was set to in_progress (e.g., by a previous fix-bug run that didn't complete) is invisible to debug-everything forever — stuck with no way to be automatically picked up again.

comments.body: Gate 1a: skipped — CLI_user tag present; intent-aligned assumed
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: llm-behavioral — bug in skills/debug-everything/SKILL.md; skill hardcodes --status=open in all ticket queries, making in_progress bugs permanently invisible to debug-everything
comments.author: Test
